   - Short description shown on the trending page

Return a compact structured report. Do not close the browser. Report the final URL.

**1. [forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills](https://github.com/forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills)** — ★49,753 (+7,959 today)
